xf:var.name: library-display-name
xf:var.value: if (exists($library-app) and not($library-published)) then if ($library-app = (frf:globalLibraryAppName(), frf:specialLibraryAppName())) then (: If we don't have a global library in Form Builder, use 'Global Library' as the title :) $form-resources/global-library/label else (: If we don't have an app library in Form Builder, use 'App Library' as the title :) $form-resources/app-library/label else (: Otherwise use the title of the library form :) ( fb:metadata/fb:display-name[@lang = $lang], fb:metadata/fb:display-name[1], 'Library' )[1]

xf:var.name: has-section-component

xf:group.ref: .[ not($library-app = frf:specialLibraryAppName() and not($library-published)) and (xbl:binding or exists($library-app)) ]

xf:output.value: concat( (: Icon :) if (exists($metadata/fb:icon/fb:small-icon)) then concat('') else if (exists($metadata/fb:icon/fb:icon-class)) then concat('') else '', (: Description :) ($metadata/fb:display-name[@lang = $lang], $metadata/fb:display-name[1])[1] )
